accurate.why: Describing payment to 'estates or eligible survivors' is accurate as section 5121 covers both estates and surviving family members. The amendment to Section 6107 of Title 38 is correctly identified. Fiduciary prohibition correctly noted.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Mentions amendment to Section 6107 of Title 38 USC.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the prohibition on paying the misusing fiduciary.

effective_dates.why: Notes enactment date but no internal effective date applies.

correct_entities.why: Section 6107 of Title 38, VA, section 5121 all correctly referenced.

correct_figures.why: No dollar amounts or quantities to verify.
